news.headline: Kinetic invests $1M in fiber internet network for 300 homes/businesses in Doniphan, part of $2B plan in 18 states.
news.summary: In Doniphan, Missouri, Kinetic, a top provider of fiber broadband solutions for residential and small business users, recently finished a new fiber internet infrastructure project worth approximately $1 million. This development caters to 300 homes and businesses in the area. As part of Kinetic's extensive initiative, the $890,000 investment is a component of their broader plan, totaling $2 billion, aimed at expanding fiber connectivity to households and small businesses across 18 states in their service area. The project's completion was celebrated at a ribbon-cutting event on October 17, held at the local Kinetic office in collaboration with the Ripley County Chamber of Commerce.

news.headline: Kraken launches Ink: Layer-2 (L2) on Optimism Superchain for DeFi, expanding access for wealth building opportunities.
news.summary: The cryptocurrency exchange Kraken has recently revealed its new project, Ink, a layer-2 (L2) platform developed on the Optimism Superchain. This initiative aims to create a robust ecosystem within Decentralized Finance (DeFi). Ink serves as a connection point between users and DeFi developers, facilitating secure and user-friendly access to various financial opportunities. By leveraging the technology of the Optimism Superchain, Ink promises to streamline the DeFi experience and broaden the access to wealth-building opportunities for a wider audience. With its focus on security and usability, Kraken's Ink is poised to become a significant player in the DeFi space.

news.headline: Real Estate Split Corp. reports a successful overnight offering, raising a substantial amount of funds.
news.summary: According to recent reports, around 450 individuals have been affected by the outbreak of a new virus in a major city in Asia. The virus has spread rapidly with over 50 new cases being reported each day. Health officials have confirmed that to date, 12 deaths have occurred due to complications from the virus. Authorities have imposed a quarantine in the most affected areas and are advising people to take necessary precautions to prevent further spread of the virus. Research and testing are ongoing to develop a vaccine for the virus.

news.headline: Middlefield Real Estate Dividend ETF (TSX: MREL) announces Q4 2024 distributions for unitholders.
news.summary: In Toronto on October 24, 2024, the Middlefield Real Estate Dividend ETF (TSX: MREL) disclosed that distributions for Q4 2024 will be issued to unitholders. The Fund expressed satisfaction in conveying the upcoming payments.

news.headline: LongPath Tech secures $162.4M loan from DOE for methane emissions. Event on Oct 25, 2024, at CU Boulder. via @BusinessWire
news.summary: LongPath Technologies, a prominent player in methane emissions control, is set to mark the finalization of a substantial loan package of $162.4 million provided by the U.S. Department of Energy's Loan Programs Office on Friday, October 25, 2024. The celebratory event will take place from 9-11:30 am MT at the University of Colorado Boulder campus and will feature a tour of the Rieker Laser Lab, showcasing the cutting-edge quantum laser technology central to LongPath's methane detection solutions.

news.headline: USTMA releases 16th End-of-Life Tire Management Report, highlighting progress in recycling. Calls for continued collaboration.
news.summary: The U.S. Tire Manufacturers Association (USTMA) has published its latest report on End-of-Life Tire Management, marking the 16th edition of this annual release.

news.headline: AIoT market to grow from $18.37 billion in 2024 to $79.13 billion by 2030 at a CAGR of 27.6%. IBM and Cisco dominate with Amazon, Google, Microsoft also playing key roles. Major drivers include data growth, automation demand, and enhanced user experiences. Main restraints are high implementation costs and limited interoperability. Increasing IoT investments and security needs present opportunities. Generative AI tech and regulatory frameworks further drive market growth.
news.summary: The AIoT Market is poised for significant growth, with a projected increase from USD 18.37 billion in 2024 to USD 79.13 billion by 2030, at a CAGR of 27.6%. The integration of AI into IoT systems is highlighted as essential for enhancing efficiency and competitiveness. Key drivers include the exponential growth of data from IoT devices, demand for automation, and the need for improved user experiences. However, challenges such as high implementation costs and limited interoperability exist. Opportunities lie in increasing IoT investments and the demand for advanced security solutions. Major market players include IBM, Cisco, AWS, Google, Microsoft, and Oracle. Generative AI technologies are also gaining traction, with companies viewing them as crucial for future strategies. The regulatory framework for AI usage is becoming more defined, presenting both safeguards and opportunities for companies adopting AIoT.

news.headline: Embassy REIT leases 2.1M sqft in Q2 FY2025, revenue up 12% YoY, occupancy reaches 90% - strong growth reported.
news.summary: In Bengaluru, India, Embassy Office Parks REIT announced their second-quarter results for the period ending on September 30, 2024. The report includes key financial figures and performance metrics.

news.headline: Tesla stock surges 14% on early Christmas boost; offers investors an aggressive entry on earnings.
news.summary: Investors considering a potential early entry into Tesla may find the stock appealing following a surge of 14% in response to positive earnings. The recent increase has sparked bullish sentiment among investors, with many viewing it as an early Christmas gift. Tesla's stock performance has drawn significant attention, indicating a possible strong investment opportunity for those seeking aggressive growth.

news.headline: Boeing workers decline 35% pay increase to $140K, strike ongoing. Suppliers unaffected.
news.summary: On Wednesday, union workers at Boeing declined the most recent offer from the aerospace giant, Dow Jones. The proposal included a substantial 35% pay increase, raising wages to $140,000. Despite this rejection, suppliers are not notably affected by the ongoing strike.

news.headline: Major tech companies report earnings next week, including Apple, Microsoft, Google, Amazon, and Meta Platforms with a combined market cap of $12 trillion. Prepare for significant financial results.
news.summary: Next week, major companies such as Apple, Microsoft, Google, Amazon, and Meta Platforms are set to release their earnings reports. These companies, collectively known as the S&P 500 giants, boast a staggering combined market capitalization of $12 trillion. The anticipation surrounding their earnings reports suggests that the impact on the market may exceed this substantial figure. Prepare for significant movements in stock prices as these tech giants announce their financial performance.

news.headline: UPS stock rallied on growth but with a caveat; UPS and FedEx up on Thursday, as per Investors Business Daily.
news.summary: UPS and FedEx experienced an uptick in their stock prices at the beginning of the day on Thursday. UPS stock saw a significant rally due to a return to growth, although there was a caveat to their performance. The details can be found in an article by Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Texas Instruments increases GaN manufacturing, 4x capacity in US & Japan. GaN-based semiconductors are in production.
news.summary: In recent developments, Texas Instruments (TI) has expanded its Gallium Nitride (GaN) manufacturing operations in Japan, effectively increasing its internal GaN manufacturing capacity by four times across its facilities in the United States and Japan. The company's GaN-based semiconductors are currently in production and are readily accessible for customers. TI's efforts are focused on providing the market with the most energy-efficient, reliable, and power-dense semiconductor solutions.

news.headline: FM announces US$400M "Resilience Credit" to aid climate resilience, reaching over US$1B in total support over 3 years.
news.summary: FM, a commercial property insurer, has announced its third resilience credit in Johnston, R.I. The credit will allocate over $1 billion to assist clients in protecting their purpose over the past three years. This marks a significant investment by FM in supporting clients in building resilience against unforeseen challenges.

news.headline: Standex (NYSE: SXI) will release Q1 fiscal 2025 results on Oct 29 after market close and hold a conference call at 8:30am ET.
news.summary: On October 24, 2024, Standex International Corporation (NYSE: SXI) disclosed that it will reveal its financial performance for the first quarter of fiscal year 2025 on October 29, 2024, after the market closes. The conference call discussing these results will be broadcast live on the Internet at 8:30 a.m. ET. Standex International Corporation is an NYSE-listed company and will present its data to the public during this event.

news.headline: Chobani unveils new headquarters Chobani House in NY with business operations, community kitchen, incubator lab, and global innovation center under one roof. Making long-term commitment to NYC.
news.summary: Chobani, LLC, a leading food and beverage company, has announced its long-term commitment to New York City by consolidating its business operations, community kitchen, incubator lab, and global innovation center under one roof. This move is set to bring a range of opportunities and services to the city. The announcement was made on October 24, 2024.

news.headline: aytm launches Skipper, an AI-powered research assistant, aiming to enhance consumer insights for global firms.
news.summary: In San Francisco on October 24, 2024, aytm, a top agile consumer insights platform serving renowned consumer brands, CPG companies, and creative agencies, unveiled Skipper, an AI research assistant. Skipper aims to revolutionize the industry with its advanced technology.

news.headline: CorroHealth partners with Patient Square Capital for strategic investment in revenue cycle management solutions.
news.summary: In Plano, Texas on October 24, 2024, CorroHealth, a prominent company specializing in revenue cycle management (RCM) solutions for health systems and health plans, revealed that it has finalized agreements for a strategic investment from Patient Square Capital. This investment from Patient Square is set to significantly impact CorroHealth's operations and growth in the healthcare sector.

news.headline: Investors eye Tesla Robotaxi as a lucrative opportunity; ARK's Keeney optimistic.
INmune Bio Inc. will announce Q3 2024 financial results and corporate update on October 31, 2024.
Genprex partners with University of Michigan and ALK Positive for lung cancer study on TUSC2 combined with ALK inhibitors. Expansion of patient population for Reqorsa gene therapy.
news.summary: A study is being conducted to investigate the combination of TUSC2 and ALK-Inhibitors in collaboration with a non-profit patient-focused research group in order to expand the potential lung cancer patient population for Reqorsa® gene therapy. The company involved, Genprex, Inc. (NASDAQ: ), based in Austin, Texas, announced this initiative on October 24, 2024. This research aims to target a wider range of patients affected by lung cancer and improve the effectiveness of gene therapy in treating this disease.

news.headline: MOO Imbalance
Performance Shipping Inc. secures sale and leaseback agreement for 2nd LR2 Aframax tanker, expected delivery in Q1 2026.
news.summary: Athens, Greece - On October 24, 2024, Performance Shipping Inc. (NASDAQ: PSHG), a global shipping company focusing on tanker vessels ownership, disclosed a significant deal. The company, through a wholly-owned subsidiary, has finalized a sale and leaseback agreement with an unrelated third party for a newbuild LR2 Aframax tanker vessel. This vessel, part of a duo of newbuilding LNG-ready, scrubber-fitted LR2 product/crude oil tanker vessels, has a carrying capacity of around 114,000 deadweight tons. It was initially announced on December 20, 2023, with an anticipated delivery to the company slated for the first quarter of 2026.

news.headline: Honeywell Q3 revenue grew 6% to $9.728 billion, missing consensus. Adjusted EPS at $2.58 (+8% Y/Y). Operating margin contracted by 180 bps Y/Y.
news.summary: Honeywell International Inc. (NASDAQ:HON) saw its shares dip following the release of its third-quarter results and updated guidance for Fiscal Year 2024. The company posted a 6% year-over-year revenue growth, reaching $9.728 billion, with organic growth at +3%, falling short of the projected $9.901 billion. The surge in sales was driven by robust performance in defense and space, commercial aviation, and building solutions. The adjusted EPS came in at $2.58, marking an 8% increase from the previous year and surpassing the anticipated $2.50. Sales figures by segment were Aerospace Technologies at $3.912 billion (+12% Y/Y), Industrial Automation at $2.50 billion (-5% Y/Y), Building Automation at $1.75 billion (+14% Y/Y), and Energy and Sustainability Solutions at $1.56 billion (+1% Y/Y). Operating margin shrank by 180 basis points year-over-year to 19.1%, while Segment margin held steady at 23.6%. The company reported an operating cash flow of $2.00 billion and free cash flow of $1.72 billion. Additionally, Honeywell had approximately $10.6 billion in cash and equivalents.

news.headline: Shardeum exec discusses how they are preparing for potential regulatory changes in the digital assets market due to the U.S. presidential election. Global reach allows monitoring of regulatory trends. Adaptation to new regulations while maintaining secure operations.
news.summary: As the U.S. presidential election nears, Kelsey McGuire, Shardeum's chief growth officer and speaker at Benzinga’s Future of Digital Assets event, discussed the company's preparation for regulatory shifts. With a global presence, Shardeum can track regulatory and political developments worldwide, including in the U.S. McGuire stated, “We closely monitor potential regulatory modifications in the U.S., observing proposed policy alterations and political stances.” While forecasting digital asset regulations in the U.S. remains complex, Shardeum's adaptable network is primed to comply with new rules while ensuring secure and cost-efficient processes.

news.headline: Analyst Jim Bianco defends election betting markets, stating Trump is trading over 50% and rising, believes they're accurate and not manipulated.
news.summary: Jim Bianco, the President of Bianco Research, recently addressed concerns about potential manipulation in election betting markets. He affirmed that these markets, including Polymarket, PredictIt, and Kalshi, are functioning fairly and accurately represent available information. Bianco supported his stance with data comparisons between betting markets, polling aggregators, and election models. According to his analysis, Donald Trump's trading percentage has risen above 50% and has been consistently increasing for several weeks. Bianco emphasized that the volume in these markets is indicative of their authenticity. The complete story can be read on a financial news website.

news.headline: ECB's Kazaks: The direction of ECB policy is clear, uncertainty is very high though.
TOMI Environmental Solutions (NASDAQ: TOMZ) secures contract in Malaysia for SteraMist Technology, expanding global presence.
news.summary: In Frederick, Maryland on October 24, 2024, TOMI Environmental Solutions, Inc. (NASDAQ: TOMZ), a renowned global firm focusing on disinfection and decontamination solutions, revealed a recent achievement. The company has successfully landed a contract with the National Institute of Forensic Medicine (IPFN) in Malaysia. This significant agreement marks a strategic advancement for TOMI as it pushes forward in enhancing its presence worldwide in vital sectors. The company is aiming to capitalize on the increasing demand for its services on a global scale.

news.headline: CPSC announces recalls for CFMOTO All-Terrain Vehicles due to crash hazards. View recalls at www.cpsc.gov.
news.summary: On October 24, 2024, the United States Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) released information regarding multiple recalls in partnership with various companies. These recalls, which can be found at www.cpsc.gov, include CFMOTO's recall of all-terrain vehicles due to potential crash hazards. For further details on these recalls and others, the CPSC website provides comprehensive information for consumers to stay informed.

news.headline: Acela Architects + Engineers member Sean D. Billings earns BICSI RCDD certification, a premier industry credential.
news.summary: A company based in Allentown, Pennsylvania, Acela Architects + Engineers, shared news on October 24, 2024, that their employee Sean D. Billings, PE, has achieved BICSI Registered Communication Distribution Design (RCDD) certification. This certification is the top credential given by BICSI, an organization in the building industry. This achievement highlights Sean D. Billings' expertise in communication distribution design.

news.headline: Custom Ink survey shows 2024 increase in job satisfaction and retention with regular swag gifts. #EmployeeSatisfaction
news.summary: A recent survey conducted by Custom Ink in 2024 revealed that branded gifts play a significant role in enhancing employee retention rates. The study indicated that receiving branded swag from employers, such as custom apparel and accessories, not only fosters positive sentiments towards the company but also strengthens the employees' bond with their team. The findings suggest that companies who utilize branded gifts are more likely to experience increased employee satisfaction and a sense of connection among team members. The survey was conducted among Custom Ink employees and was based in Fairfax, Virginia.

news.headline: Applied Materials and NUS are expanding a semiconductor lab in Singapore with a larger cleanroom. New programs for talent development announced.
news.summary: In Singapore, on October 24, 2024, Applied Materials South East Asia Pte. Ltd. and the National University of Singapore (NUS) announced a new phase of collaboration. This phase will involve the development of a larger and more advanced cleanroom facility. Additionally, a Professorship will be established at NUS, and new talent development programs will be implemented. The initiative aims to enhance research and innovation in the region and promote academic-industry partnerships.

news.headline: Credit Sesame launches AI platform in SaaS for credit management; aims to revolutionize finance industry. Oct. 24, 2024.
news.summary: Sesame, a platform specializing in embedded finance and credit intelligence, enables businesses to drive new growth and enhance customer satisfaction. The announcement was made in San Francisco on October 24, 2024. Credit Sesame, a leader in consumer-oriented financial technology, revealed the launch of their latest platform offering.

news.headline: ECB's Kazaks: The ECB mustn't be restrictive when inflation is durably 2%.
Aragon (ANT) holders can swap tokens for Ethereum (ETH) via Binance at a set rate by November 8, 2024.
news.summary: ANT holders are now able to exchange their tokens for ETH at a steady rate through Binance, as announced by the Aragon Association. This redemption opportunity is set to conclude by November 8, 2024.

news.headline: Nasdaq's Q3 revenue rose 22% to $1.15B, missing estimates. ARR surged 31% to $2.74B, earning $872M from solutions.
news.summary: Nasdaq, Inc (NASDAQ:NDAQ) released its third-quarter financial results, showcasing a 22% annual revenue growth to $1.15 billion. This figure fell short of the anticipated analyst consensus of $1.17 billion. Despite this, the financial services company exceeded predictions for adjusted earnings per share (EPS) by reaching 74 cents, compared to the expected 69 cents. However, the stock price dipped following the announcement. Nasdaq's Annualized Recurring Revenue (ARR) surged by 31% year-on-year, reaching $2.74 billion. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: QuantumScape (NYSE: QS) shares surge after producing first B-sample cells with energy density over 800 Wh/L shipped to customers for testing, following Q3 loss of 23 cents/share.
news.summary: QuantumScape Corp (NYSE:QS) shares saw an increase as the company revealed the launch of its first b-sample cells, QSE-5, being sent out to customers for testing. Following the release of their third-quarter financial results, which showed a loss of 23 cents per share in line with analyst predictions, QuantumScape began production of the cells with an energy density exceeding 800 Wh/L and rapid-charging capabilities of under 15 minutes. This step marks a significant advancement for the company and the battery sector, with the full report accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Harley-Davidson reports Q3 sales drop of 26%, with combined revenue of $881.21 million. Stock slides after print.
news.summary: Harley-Davidson Inc (NYSE:HOG) disclosed its third-quarter 2024 financial outcomes on Thursday, with combined revenue from HDMC and LiveWire reaching $881.21 million. The overall revenue dropped by 26% to $1.15 billion, missing the analyst consensus of $965.78 million. This reduction was primarily caused by a 32% revenue decline for HDMC, partially offset by a 10% increase for HDFS. Consequently, HOG stock declined post-announcement. Global retail motorcycle sales saw a 13% decrease, with North American retail performance down by 10%. An analysis of the full report is accessible on a finance platform.

news.headline: Dow Inc reports Q3 sales of $10.88B and EPS of $0.47, beating consensus estimates. Volume increased by 1%, operating EBIT rose to $641M.
news.summary: Shares of Dow Inc (NYSE:DOW) have risen following the release of their third-quarter results. The company reported a 1% increase in sales compared to the previous year, reaching $10.88 billion, surpassing the expected $10.65 billion. Adjusted earnings per share (EPS) were reported at $0.47, beating the projected $0.46.Local prices remained stable, with improvements in Packaging & Specialty Plastics offsetting declines in Performance Materials & Coatings segments. However, prices fell 1% sequentially. Volume also saw a 1% increase, driven by the Performance Materials & Coatings segment.Operating EBIT increased to $641 million from $626 million last year, with the margin expanding by 10 basis points to 5.9% for the quarter. Packaging & Specialty Plastics sales went up by 1% to $5.52 billion, and the operating EBIT margin increased by 250 basis points to 11.2%.Overall, the company has demonstrated positive performance in various segments, especially in the U.S. and Canada. Further details can be found on financial news platform Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Wingstop named official chicken partner of NBA and NBA G League in multiyear deal on October 24, 2024.
news.summary: In a joint announcement on October 24, 2024, in New York and Dallas, the National Basketball Association (NBA) and Wingstop (NASDAQ: WING) unveiled a long-term collaboration. This partnership designates Wingstop as the Official Chicken Partner of both the NBA and NBA G League. The deal, which is the first official partnership of its kind for Wingstop...

news.headline: HGC boosts telecommunications infrastructure, AI-powered services. Strong business performance in fiscal year 2024.
news.summary: HGC Global Communications, a prominent ICT service provider and network operator with worldwide reach, revealed strong financial results for fiscal year 2024 in Hong Kong on October 24th, 2024. The company focuses on enhancing AI-powered services to meet growing demands, showcasing its commitment to innovation and technological advancement. The announcement underscores HGC's position as a leading player in the industry, with significant global presence and a dedication to providing top-notch services.

news.headline: Senior IMF Official: Most Asian central banks have room to cut interest rates as Fed began easing cycle, easing fears among region's policymakers that doing so before the Fed could put their currencies under pressure.
Senior IMF Official: Risks to Asia's outlook are to downside on tentative signs that global demand could weaken.
Acuity Brands to acquire QSC, LLC in expansion move for Cloud-Manageable AV & Controls. Smarter, safer, greener tech.
news.summary: Acuity, based in Costa Mesa, California, has successfully completed the acquisition of QSC, LLC. This strategic move allows Acuity to broaden its offerings in Cloud-Manageable Audio, Video, and Controls. The acquisition aims to enhance spaces with intelligent, secure, and environmentally friendly technologies.

news.headline: Middlefield U.S. Equity Dividend ETF (TSX: MUSA) to pay distributions for Q4 2024 to unitholders.
news.summary: On October 24, 2024, Middlefield U.S. Equity Dividend ETF (MUSA) revealed its upcoming distributions for the fourth quarter of 2024. Unitholders of Middlefield U.S. Equity Dividend ETF are set to receive payments according to the following schedule.

news.headline: Illinois Tool Works Inc. declares $1.50 quarterly dividend per share, $6.00 annually; payable on Jan 10, 2025.
news.summary: In Glenview, Illinois, on October 24, 2024, the Board of Directors of Illinois Tool Works Inc. (NYSE: ITW) announced a dividend of $1.50 per share on the company's common stock for the fourth quarter of 2024. This amounts to $6.00 per share annually. The dividend is slated to be distributed on January 10, 2025, to shareholders recorded as of December 31, 2024.

news.headline: Climate finance will be a focal point at COP29 with discussion on the proposed NCQG - Energy Transitions Commission (ETC) report.
news.summary: The Energy Transitions Commission (ETC) recently released their newest publication titled "NDCs, NCQG, and Financing the Transition," on October 24, 2024, in London. The focus of the publication is on the importance of climate finance discussions at the upcoming COP29. One key topic of debate will be the proposed "New Collective Quantified Goal" (NCQG), emphasizing the need for concerted global efforts in addressing climate change. These discussions are crucial in securing the necessary resources to support transitions towards sustainable energy futures.

news.headline: UPM and Michelman collaborate to create 3 eco-friendly packaging solutions for brand owners, replacing non-recyclable materials.
news.summary: In Helsinki on October 24, 2024, UPM Specialty Papers and Michelman unveiled three innovative solutions to help brand owners transition from non-recyclable packaging to paper-based alternatives suitable for food contact. These cutting-edge products are aimed at replacing multi-material packaging and meeting brand owners' needs.

news.headline: PLT offers improved RipFACTOR® with water dispersibility, advancing muscle performance ingredient. Expands delivery systems.
news.summary: PLT Health Solutions, Inc, based in Morristown, N.J., on October 24, 2024, introduced improved dispersibility and taste masking for RipFACTOR® Muscle Accelerator, making it suitable for various new delivery systems. This enhancement aims to enhance the taste and performance of the product. Recognized for its benefits in strength, endurance, and muscle growth, RipFACTOR® is now more versatile with wider applications. This innovation marks a significant development in the supplement industry, providing consumers with an enhanced user experience.

news.headline: Urbint receives $35 million investment from S2G to enhance utility resiliency and storm response efforts.
news.summary: Urbint, a prominent AI platform specializing in identifying and addressing threats to workers, critical infrastructure, and communities, disclosed on October 24, 2024, its successful acquisition of a significant investment of $35 million. This financial boost will enable Urbint to expand its operations aimed at enhancing utility resiliency and efficiency in storm response efforts.
